paper_title: Automatic Security Evaluation and (Related-key) Differential Characteristic Search: Application to SIMON, PRESENT, LBlock, DES(L) and Other Bit-oriented Block Ciphers

input_normalization.notes: Bundle-level intake exists and is used by the current full-chain demo lane.

algorithm_description.notes: Curated reviewable algorithm description exists for the r5 checkpoint lane.

structural_ir.notes: Curated structural IR exists for the same PRESENT-80 5-round checkpoint.

downstream_status.notes: This is the strongest current demo lane and reaches execution-backed verdict/report artifacts.

next_priority: Generalize the curated algorithm-description and structural-IR patterns into reusable extraction and projection drafts rather than keeping this lane paper-specific.
known_gaps: Algorithm description is still curated rather than extracted automatically from arbitrary materials.
Structural IR is still curated rather than generated from a draft projector.
The current lane validates a 5-round checkpoint but does not yet solver-certify the downstream 24-round claim.
notes: P1 is the anchor reference for the current frontend and downstream cryptanalysis demo lane.
